title: Compact dashboard v2 projection
goal: Polish the daemon-fed dashboard for a narrow right panel by removing duplicated sections, shortening noisy profile lines, and highlighting run state, workers, attention, checks, economics, and commands.
acceptance: Add or update a compact dashboard/feed projection that fits the right panel without long profile-line wrapping and without duplicating worker blocks.
Dashboard v2 includes concise sections for Run, Workers, Attention, Checks, Economics, Incidents when present, and Commands when actionable.
Attention lines remain full and untruncated; renderer polish must not invent workflow wording beyond daemon-owned status/feed fields.
Document the dashboard v2 before/after and the invariant that monitor/dashboard output is attach-only observability over daemon state.
must_ask_if: Compact rendering would omit terminal reasons, attention, or operator commands from the daemon feed.
A proposed renderer would use Herdr pane text or Pi extension state instead of daemon status/feed JSON.
